title: EventEnvelope.v1
description: Generic envelope every FulfillOps event uses. Event-specific schemas (e.g. OrderPlaced.v1.schema.json) extend this with allOf and narrow eventType, eventVersion, and payload. See contracts/README.md for the full field-by-field convention.

eventId.description: Unique identifier for this event instance. The outbox/inbox dedup key.

eventType.description: The event's name without its version, e.g. "OrderPlaced".

eventVersion.description: Payload schema version. A breaking payload change ships as a new version, never a mutation of an existing one.

occurredAt.description: UTC instant the event occurred, RFC 3339 with a literal Z offset (never a local offset).

correlationId.description: Identifies the end-to-end flow (e.g. one order placement) this event belongs to.

causationId.description: The eventId that directly caused this event, or null for the first event in a flow.

aggregateId.description: The domain object (order, reservation, payment, fulfillment) this event is about.

producer.description: The service that published this event.

payload.description: Event-specific fields, narrowed by each event's own schema.
